description: Python files: imported_by, entry_point, dead_candidate. Entry points and imported modules are not dead.
methodology: Entry point = main, dashboard, replay, deploy_supervisor, run_*.py (cron/deploy). Dead = never imported and not an entry point.
dead_candidates: Root-level one-off: comprehensive_score_diagnostic.py, deep_pattern_investigation.py, final_trade_readiness_check.py, run_score_investigation_on_droplet.py, trigger_immediate_droplet_action.py, reset_learning_state.py, clear_freeze_and_reset.py, fix_weights_file_and_trading.py, RUN_DROPLET_VERIFICATION_NOW.py, run_droplet_investigation.py, run_droplet_score_diagnostic.py, run_full_learning_now.py, run_diagnostic_via_ssh.py, run_verification_on_droplet.py, run_investigation_with_stash.py, run_investigation_minimal.py
archive/** (all Python — never imported by non-archive code)
reports/_daily_review_tools/*.py (invoked by path, not import — keep as scripts)

suggest.keep: All entry_points_excluded + imported_core + validation/scenarios/*.py, scripts/governance/*.py, scripts/analysis/*.py, board/eod/*.py (used by EOD), src/**
